name: horizontal-stepper
title: Horizontal Stepper
description: Compact horizontal step indicator with dash-connected labels.

content.text: HorizontalStepperStep must be used within a HorizontalStepper
HorizontalStepperStep must be used within a HorizontalStepper

docs.description: Compact horizontal step indicator with dash-connected labels.

notes.title: Compound Component
notes.content: Use HorizontalStepper.Step (or named Step import) for each step. Each step receives its status (active/completed/pending) via context. Use useStepInfo() to build fully custom step components.
